business.headline: The global oil crisis is worsening. How badly is it being underestimated?Crude oil prices are rising, supply is tightening, and the West Asia war shows no sign of ending. So how much of this oil crisis is the world still underestimating?

Why KYC is everywhere and why it frustrates so many IndiansCKYC was meant to make identity verification a one-time process, but for most Indians, KYC remains a repeated, unavoidable step across platforms. This story unpacks why a system built to simplify verification still leaves users proving who they are, again and again.

The first 30 days of FY27: 7 smart money moves to make in AprilThe new financial year has just begun, and April is the time to take charge. The decisions you make now can shape your money journey for the rest of the year. In our new 'MONEY MAKEOVER' series, we break down simple, smart steps to get started right.

Tech layoffs: Is AI replacing jobs or are companies fixing overhiring?Job cuts have been reported across tech companies, showing that the trend is not limited to a single type of company. The trend has raised a key question. Are companies correcting overhiring from the past, or is artificial intelligence starting to reduce the need for certain roles?

DA hike: How much will your salary and pension increase this time?With the next dearness allowance (DA) hike expected soon, central government employees and pensioners are watching closely. Even a small rise can push up monthly income, but how much extra can you really expect this time?

Markets down, rupee weak. Why Iran war may now hit your home loanThe impact of Iran war has not been limited to Dalal Street. The rupee has also come under pressure as oil prices moved higher. Now, the ripple effect of the conflict could reach households, especially those with home loans.

Iran war hit your portfolio? Track these 4 signals to stay ahead on Dalal StreetFor investors, the bigger challenge is not just falling markets, but the confusion around what to track. Headlines are changing rapidly, with mixed signals on escalation, oil prices and supply disruptions. This makes it difficult to take clear investment decisions.

Getting 8.2% on small savings? Don't invest before these 5 key checksGetting returns of up to 8.2% on small savings schemes may sound like an easy win. But before you lock your money in, it's worth pausing to check a few basics that could impact your finances later.

Income tax filing 2026: Which 5 key links should every taxpayer check now?Filing your income tax return in 2026 may feel a bit different this time. With the portal revamped and new rules in place, knowing where to click can save both time and effort. Here are five key links you should not miss.

Layoffs everywhere, but this company says no job cutsThe company has said it will not cut jobs despite ongoing global uncertainty. It has committed to retaining its workforce and continuing salary payments without delay.
Good Friday 2026: Is stock market open or closed today?Both stock exchanges, the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE) and the National Stock Exchange (NSE), are closed on April 3 on account of Good Friday.

Why buying diamonds is expensive but fails as an investmentThe biggest issue with diamonds is the resale value. Unlike gold, which can be sold easily at market-linked prices, diamonds do not have a strong resale market.

Govt puts mandatory 60% free airline seat rule on hold amid jet fuel price riseThe government has put on hold its directive requiring airlines to offer at least 60% of seats without additional charges, pending further review.

Economic costs are increasing every day: Dr Sajjid Chinoy on impact of Iran warDr Sajjid Z Chinoy, MD and Chief India Economist at JP Morgan, discussed the escalating economic impact of the war on global and Indian markets.

India imposes 25% cap on monthly jet fuel price increase for domestic flightsIndia imposes 25% cap on monthly jet fuel price increase for domestic flights, Reuters reports citing an official statement

Good Friday holiday: Will NSE and BSE be open or closed on April 3?The stock market holiday list for 2026 includes a total of 16 non-trading days, excluding weekends. With several holidays already behind us, there are still multiple breaks lined up over the coming months.

Gold slips over RS 5,000, silver plunges Rs 15,000: What's behind the sudden fall?Precious metals, often seen as safe bets in uncertain times, have unexpectedly slipped. The latest drop in gold and silver prices has left investors wondering what's driving the decline despite global tensions.
Sensex ends 185 points higher, Nifty above 22,700; HCLTech up 3%Sensex ends 185 points higher, Nifty above 22,700; HCLTech up 3%

Markets rebound: Sensex, Nifty recover losses after early crash. Here's whyEarlier in the day, both Sensex and Nifty had fallen nearly 2%, reacting to fresh comments from US President Donald Trump, who said the United States would hit Iran "extremely hard" in the coming weeks.

Form 15G, 15H gone: Will new Form 121 simplify TDS for taxpayers?Form 121 is a self-declaration that allows individuals to request that no TDS be deducted on certain types of income. This usually includes interest earned from bank deposits, post office schemes, or similar sources.

entertainment.headline: Actor Rahul Banerjee's death: All film, TV shoots in Bengal suspended from Tuesday Tollywood has come to a standstill after the death of actor Rahul Arunoday Banerjee. The incident, which occurred in Odisha, prompted a suspension of all shoots from April 7, 2026, across industry.

Dhurandhar 2 Day 18: Film nets Rs 1,000 crore in India, sets Bollywood record Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge has become the first Hindi film to cross Rs 1,000 crore net in India. Led by Ranveer Singh, the film continues its strong run at the box office even on Day 18.

Piyush Mishra told wife about affairs, admits he wasn't a good husband Actor Piyush Mishra opened up about confessing his extramarital affairs to wife Priya Narayanan. He said their relationship grew stronger with honesty and her continued support.

Did you shoot with Hanuman? Ranbir Kapoor on how Raha reacted to his Ramayana role Ranbir Kapoor shared that his daughter Raha is fascinated by his role in Nitesh Tiwari's Ramayana, often asking him if he shot scenes with Hanuman. Ranbir plays Lord Rama in the upcoming film.

Vignesh Shivan regrets fallout with Dhanush, says he feels ashamed about it Filmmaker Vignesh Shivan expressed deep regret over his strained friendship with actor Dhanush. Despite the fallout, Vignesh stated that he continues to admire the Maari star.

Kya Kamaal Hai: Diljit Dosanjh teams up with AR Rahman for Main Vaapas Aaunga song The song Kya Kamaal Hai brings together Diljit Dosanjh and AR Rahman in Imtiaz Ali's upcoming film, Main Vaapas Aaunga. The track, written by Irshad Kamil, hints at a romantic drama led by melody and emotion.

Sunny Deol bonds with Satinder Sartaaj over music and meal, shares pics Actor Sunny Deol recently met Punjabi folk singer Satinder Sartaaj for his next film, Gabru. They shared pictures on their respective social media handles, expressing mutual appreciation for each other's work.

Soul of Dhurandhar: Aditya Dhar praises film's cinematographer Vikash Nowlakha Aditya Dhar praised cinematographer Vikash Nowlakha as the "soul behind" Dhurandhar: The Revenge. He highlighted Nowlakha's contribution to the film's visual storytelling.

Love Insurance Kompany trailer: Love meets sci-fi in Pradeep Ranganathan's next Directed by Vignesh Shivan, Love Insurance Kompany is a futuristic romance where algorithms dictate love. Starring Pradeep Ranganathan and Krithi Shetty, the film explores modern relationships in a tech-driven world.

Shah Rukh Khan, Salman Khan add glamour at a wedding in Delhi. Videos Bollywood stars Shah Rukh Khan and Salman Khan attended a wedding in Delhi. The event also saw appearances from political and other film personalities.

Rashmika Mandanna marks 30th birthday with fierce new poster from Mysaa Rashmika Mandanna celebrates her 30th birthday with the release of a new poster from her upcoming film Mysaa. It features her transformation into a warrior character.

Prabhas's Fauzi team issues warning after set pics surface online The makers of Fauzi have issued a strict warning after leaked set photos circulated online, urging fans not to share or engage with such content.

When Dhurandhar's Rakesh Bedi got surprise call mid-interview from Vicky Kaushal Actor Rakesh Bedi received a surprise call from Vicky Kaushal, who praised his performance in Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge, calling it incredible and fun to watch.

Janhvi Kapoor recalls seeing her morphed images on porn site: There is no morality Janhvi Kapoor revealed that at age 15, she discovered a morphed image of herself on a porn site, a shocking experience that still affects her today. She explained how AI-generated visuals continue to circulate online, creating misleading impressions and impacting her professional life.

Hrithik Roshan reacts to Ramayana VFX debate, calls for mindful criticism Hrithik Roshan weighed in on the VFX debate around Ramayana, urging audiences to understand creative intent rather than dismiss visuals outright.

Global first, desi later: Ramayana's bold, big-screen bet beyond Indian box office The Ramayana teaser signals a bold global-first rollout, with the makers positioning the epic for international audiences from the outset. Here's why this ambitious approach, backed by scale and storytelling, could redefine how Indian epics travel worldwide.

Dhurandhar 2 Day 17: Film crosses Rs 1,564 crore globally and Rs 1,179.30 in India Dhurandhar 2 continues its blockbuster run, crossing Rs 1000 crore in India gross and Rs 1,564 crore worldwide. Ranveer Singh's spy thriller sees a strong third-week boost.
Ranveer Singh recreates Akshaye Khanna's viral Dhurandhar line at NMACC gala. Watch Ranveer Singh recreated iconic dialogues from Dhurandhar at the NMACC gala, winning cheers from the audience.

Ranbir Kapoor as Rama looks a little harsh: TV's popular Lakshman, Sunil Lahri Actor Sunil Lahri shared his views on Ranbir Kapoor's portrayal of Lord Rama in Ramayana Part 1, amid mixed reactions to the teaser. While noting certain missing qualities, he expressed confidence that the actor will justify the role.

general news.headline: Whole region will burn as you follow Netanyahu's commands: Iran slams Trump's rantTrump's abusive threat drew a sharp and sarcastic response from the Iranian Embassy in Thailand, which posted on X: "Judging by how POTUS swears like a teenager, it seems the US has reached the Stone Age sooner than expected."

CIA deception, mountain escape: How US fooled Iran and rescued airman in daring opThe CIA launched a deception operation within Iran, disseminating false information that the airman had been found and was being moved overland for extraction. This misdirection aimed to divert Iranian search efforts away from the officer's actual location.

Rain, hail likely across parts of India, multiple regions on alert this weekIsolated thunderstorms, along with spells of rain and even hail, are likely in several parts of India over the coming days, with a moderate to high chance of activity in some areas.

Open fu***ng Strait of Hormuz, you ba***rds: Trump's abusive Iran rantDonald Trump warned that Tuesday could see sweeping attacks on Iran's power plants and bridges, framing it as a decisive moment in the conflict. The language, however, drew as much attention as the threat itself, with him openly hurling insults at Iran.

When Dhurandhar's Rakesh Bedi got surprise call mid-interview from Vicky KaushalActor Rakesh Bedi received a surprise call from Vicky Kaushal, who praised his performance in Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge, calling it incredible and fun to watch.

Girl tied with chain, beaten by ex-Army man for stealing guavas, video surfacesPolice said the accused allegedly took the girl inside his house, tied her to a staircase with a chain and assaulted her.

CSK were outplayed in a one-sided Southern Derby, slumping to a third straight defeat in the new season.

Live: Iran's IRGC claims attack on Israeli-linked ship off UAE's coastUS-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: US President Donald Trump has escalated tensions with Iran, warning that "power plants and bridges" could be targeted if the Strait of Hormuz is not reopened by Tuesday evening, saying "Tuesday will be Power Plant Day, and Bridge Day, all wrapped up in one." Trump's abusive threat drew a sharp from Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, who warned that Trump's "reckless moves" risk dragging the country into living hell and insisting "you won't gain anything through war crimes." Behind the scenes, Oman has held urgent talks with Iran to ensure smooth flow of transit through war-hit Hormuz, while Pakistan and Egypt have kept diplomatic channels open between Washington and Tehran. At the same time, violence has intensified elsewhere, with Israeli strikes in Beirut killing at least four people and Hezbollah launching retaliatory attacks, escalating the conflict further. Follow IndiaToday.in for the latest updates.

US destroys own warplanes during pilot rescue op, Iran shares pic of wreckageA US official told the Wall Street Journal that the two MC-130J transport planes appeared to have gotten stuck during the rescue op. They were destroyed by US forces to prevent them from falling into Iranian hands.

Will blow up everything, take over Iran's oil: Trump says can reach deal by MondayDonald Trump said a breakthrough could come within hours, just ahead of the expiry of his 48-hour ultimatum for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. The comments also come before a scheduled military briefing at the White House.

Picture abhi baki hai: Raghav Chadha defends Punjab record as AAP tensions escalateA video, sharp rebuttals, and a public clash. Raghav Chadha's response to AAP's accusations opens up a deeper rift within the party, raising questions about what led to this internal showdown.

Rishabh Pant's selfless call pays off as Lucknow spoil Hyderabad's homecomingIPL 2026, SRH vs LSG: Rishabh Pant played a captain's knock, scoring an unbeaten 68 as Lucknow Super Giants opened their account in the tournament after beating Sunrisers Hyderabad by five wickets on Sunday at the Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium.

With Rs 500 for a kg of LPG, chhotu cylinder turns big daddyFor migrants, bachelors and street vendors, the small 5-kg cylinder has been a lifeline. Now the Iran war-induced LPG crunch has pushed their illegal refill rate to Rs 400-500 a kg. And the legal 5-kg cylinders are hard to find. Truly, the chhotu has become the baap, or even the granddaddy of LPG cylinders.

Pawan Khera claims Himanta Sarma's wife holds 3 passports, Assam CM to sue himWeeks before the Assam Assembly elections, Congress demanded a probe into Riniki Sarma's nationality, multiple passports, and the CM's election affidavit. Himanta Biswa Sarma dismissed the claims as a 'propaganda campaign' aimed at undermining the BJP ahead of the polls.

BSF considers snakes, crocodiles to curb infiltration along Bangladesh borderAccording to sources, the idea is being considered for vulnerable stretches of the India-Bangladesh border where conventional fencing is not feasible. The 4,096-km-long border includes nearly 175 km of riverine and swampy terrain, making it difficult to curb infiltration, smuggling, and other illegal activities through physical barriers alone.

Himanta claims Assam candidate's family consume beef in video. She files complaintAssam Jatiya Parishad (AJP) candidate Kunki Chowdhury has filed a police complaint alleging circulation of AI-generated deepfake videos targeting her and her family, amid a parallel political controversy over alleged 'beef' posts linked to her mother.

LSG owner's reaction to Rishabh Pant's Hyderabad heroics goes viralIPL 2026, SRH vs LSG: Lucknow Super Giants owner Sanjiv Goenka looked more relieved than delighted after Rishabh Pant produced a match-winning knock in a low-scoring chase against Sunrisers Hyderabad. LSG opened their account with a five-wicket win in Hyderabad on Sunday.

Sunetra Pawar seeks Congress support for Baramati bypoll, party firm on contestingThe Congress is set to contest the Baramati assembly bypoll despite Sunetra Pawar urging the party to support an unopposed election. Asteroid bigger than Eiffel Tower will buzz past Earth. Will it hit us?An asteroid, bigger than the Eiffel Tower, and named after the Egyptian god of chaos, will pass closer to Earth than our geostationary satellites in April 2029, making it visible to the naked eye.

Maha jungle raj: PM slams Trinamool after judicial officers held hostage in MaldaPM Narendra Modi, addressing a rally in Cooch Behar, launched a sharp attack on the Trinamool Congress government, calling the Malda hostage incident involving judicial officers a reflection of "Mahajungle raj" and a collapse of law and order.

Kerala techie goes missing during trek in Karnataka, no trace of her for 4 daysGS Sharanya, a 36-year-old IT professional, was on a solo trip and reportedly stayed at a private homestay in Kakkabe village. Karnataka Forest Minister Eshwar Khandre said additional personnel and drones have been pressed into action to track the missing woman.

Liquor policy case: Kejriwal to argue in court on Monday, seeks judge's withdrawalIn a fresh development in the alleged Delhi excise policy case, Arvind Kejriwal and several other former accused have moved an application before the Delhi High Court seeking the recusal of Justice Swarn Kanta Sharma from the matter.

sports.headline: Eden Gardens under rain threat as KKR's wait for first win in IPL 2026 could continue IPL 2026, KKR vs PBKS: Uncertain weather at Eden Gardens could play spoilsport as KKR look to break their winless run in IPL 2026, with rain threatening to delay their push for a much-needed first victory.

Mohun Bagan fan attacked by opposition supporter after tense ISL match in Jamshedpur A Mohun Bagan supporter was attacked after the ISL match in Jamshedpur, suffering a head injury. The incident has raised serious concerns over fan safety and security outside stadiums.

Chinnaswamy Stadium on Sunday, a result that extended his run to seven consecutive losses as captain.

Mohammed Shami climbs powerplay charts with his most economical IPL spell IPL 2026, SRH vs LSG Mohammed Shami produced a match-defining 4-0-9-2 against Sunrisers Hyderabad, delivering the most economical spell of his IPL career and underlining his sustained powerplay dominance since 2023.

Will Cameron Green bowl vs PBKS? KKR bowling coach Tim Southee offers update Kolkata Knight Riders' marquee signing Cameron Green has resumed bowling in the nets and is edging closer to returning to the IPL playing XI as a full-fledged all-round option, bowling coach Tim Southee said on Sunday.

Mikel Arteta defends Arsenal players despite FA Cup exit: I take the responsibilityArsenal crashed out of the FA Cup quarterfinals after a 1-2 defeat to Southampton. Head coach Mikel Arteta defended his players and took responsibility for the loss. Despite injuries and setbacks, Arteta urged the squad to focus on the Premier League and UEFA Champions League as they aim to salvage their season.

My heart always beats a bit yellow: R Ashwin picks favorite ahead of RCB vs CSKRCB vs CSK: Former India all-rounder Ravichandran Ashwin picked Chennai Super Kings over Royal Challengers Bengaluru ahead of their IPL 2026 clash. The call was more emotional than logical, with Ashwin admitting that his heart 'beats a little yellow.'

SRH vs LSG Highlights: Rishabh Pant battles nerves, guides Lucknow Super Giants to winHyderabad (SRH) vs Lucknow (LSG) Highlights, IPL 2026: Rishabh Pant took Lucknow Super Giants home to guide them to their first victory of the season. LSG beat SRH by 5 wickets.

Sameer Rizvi's DC success a salute to Indian domestic cricket: Ex-India starIPL 2026: Mohammed Kaif praised Sameer Rizvi's IPL rise as a product of domestic grind. The DC youngster backed it up with a match-winning 90 vs MI.

Simeone slams VAR calls in Barcelona's controversial win vs Atletico MadridDiego Simeone questioned refereeing consistency after a VAR-heavy clash saw Atletico Madrid lose 2-1 to Barcelona. The result pushed Barcelona seven points clear at the top of La Liga following Real Madrid's slip at Mallorca.

Rishabh Pant should open for LSG, management hiding something: AshwinIPL 2026:R Ashwin has urged LSG to show clarity over Rishabh Pant's batting role. The former spinner believes Pant should be backed as a full-time opener.

RCB smell blood in Bengaluru as CSK crisis risks becoming catastropheIPL 2026, RCB vs CSK preview: The balance of power has rarely tilted this far as RCB host CSK in Bengaluru, with the defending champions in control and a faltering Super Kings side already under pressure to arrest an alarming early-season slide.

Ravi Bishnoi opens up on tough IPL comeback with RR, what went wrong at LSGIPL 2026: Ravi Bishnoi starred with a four-wicket haul to script RR's win over GT. The spinner opened up on his tough IPL phase and how he worked his way back.

B***s of steel: Shastri leads praise for Parag's leadership after Ahmedabad winRiyan Parag's bold call at the death drew praise from Ravi Shastri and Irfan Pathan after Rajasthan Royals held their nerve to defend 211 and seal a thrilling win over Gujarat Titans in Ahmedabad.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
